fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry. The description depends on what you chose in the Type field. If you did not choose Blank, the program will fill in the field when you enter something in the No. field.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item will be specified on the line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, including VAT, for this line.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Inv. Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated invoice discount amount for the line.

fields.name: Drop Shipment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if your vendor ships the items directly to your customer.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that serves as a base for calculating the Amount Including VAT field.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, excluding any invoice discount amount, that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: IC Partner Ref. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item or account in your IC partner's company that corresponds to the item or account on the line.

fields.name: IC Partner Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC partner. If the line is being sent to one of your intercompany partners, this field is used together with the IC Partner Ref. Type field to indicate the item or account in your partner's company that corresponds to the line.

fields.name: IC Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC item reference. If the line is being sent to one of your intercompany partners, this field is used together with the IC Partner Ref. Type field to indicate the itemin your partner's company that corresponds to the line.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have promised to deliver the order, as a result of the Order Promising function.
